quoteFirst: “Well,” said Jim, as he looked at the standing timber, at the stream, and spit some black tobacco juice down on the red ground, “I should make it
quoteLast: . You see, a shell may drop in here and kill a mule, or something, and delay us. Make it thirty-seven, and I will go you.”
